---
title: "Resume"
---

<div class="resume-actions reveal">
<a class="btn-primary" href="files/resume.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open Resume PDF</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/markuss-saule/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn Profile</a>
</div>

::: {.resume-layout}
::: {.resume-viewer .reveal}
<iframe class="resume-frame" src="files/resume.pdf#view=FitH" title="Markuss Saule Resume"></iframe>
<p class="resume-note">If the embedded viewer does not load in your browser, open the PDF directly with the button above.</p>
:::

::: {.resume-timeline}
## <span class="gradient-text">Experience Timeline</span>

<div class="timeline-item"><h4>May 11, 2026 - Present: Volvo Group, Business Intelligence and Analytics Intern</h4><ul><li>Optimizing AI engine workflows and analytics logic that support enterprise decision systems.</li><li>Supporting Adobe CAJ migration work with measurement continuity, validation, and web analytics governance.</li><li>Building forecasting and machine learning workflows to surface performance signals, operational risk, and high-value decision patterns.</li><li>Translating heavy web analytics into clear KPI logic, reporting layers, and decision-ready business insight.</li></ul></div>

<div class="timeline-item"><h4>Oct 2024 - May 11, 2026: BYU-Idaho Online Employment and Scheduling, Data and Campaign Analytics Coordinator</h4><ul><li>Optimized a $4,000 Meta campaign and generated 1,150+ qualified applicants.</li><li>Built KPI dashboards that increased hiring engagement by 320%.</li><li>Designed an AI-assisted screening workflow for 1,000+ applicants.</li></ul></div>

<div class="timeline-item"><h4>Jun 2025 - Sep 2025: Fresno State University Sports, Digital Data and Insights Coordinator</h4><ul><li>Built a sponsor scoring model for 350+ prospects using fit and outreach metrics.</li><li>Automated dashboards that reduced weekly reporting time by 70%.</li><li>Guided multi-channel strategy using performance segmentation across 4+ channels.</li></ul></div>

<div class="timeline-item"><h4>2020 - 2024: Roblox Immersive Brand Worlds, 3D Environment Artist and World Build Lead</h4><ul><li>Built 3D environments, vehicles, terrain systems, props, and branded spaces across shipped Roblox experiences totaling 6.5B+ place visits.</li><li>Worked on large-scale brand and entertainment activations connected to Warner Music, Sony-era Roblox music experiences, DC/Black Adam, Bakugan, L'Oreal, JDRF, and other global IP campaigns.</li><li>Balanced visual direction, player movement, performance budgets, launch deadlines, and brand constraints for high-traffic interactive worlds.</li><li>Personally commended by Roblox CEO David Baszucki for contributions during the early interactive concert era on Roblox.</li></ul></div>

<div class="timeline-item"><h4>Aug 2023 - Jul 2024: American Councils (US State Department), City Lead and Project Manager</h4><ul><li>Tracked participation and demographic data for 550+ program applicants.</li><li>Facilitated six data-informed leadership workshops with measurement loops.</li><li>Produced structured cross-border reporting for grant-compliance workflows.</li></ul></div>

<div class="timeline-item"><h4>Jun 2021 - Oct 2021: Ministry of Health of Latvia, Marketing and Analytics Intern</h4><ul><li>Analyzed vaccination trends for a national COVID campaign reaching 20,000+ people.</li><li>Aligned insight-sharing across three departments to improve campaign precision.</li></ul></div>

## <span class="gradient-text">Education and Credentials</span>

- BYU-Idaho: BS Business Analytics (Apr 2027 target), 4.0 GPA
- Minors: Statistics, Data Science
- Certifications: Google BI, Google PM, Google Digital Marketing and E-commerce, IBM Business Analyst, DataCamp SQL Associate

## <span class="gradient-text">Project Signature</span>

- MERCURY market microstructure lab with multi-agent exchange simulation, flash-crash experiments, and reproducible research publishing
- Roblox immersive brand-world production across shipped games and global activations totaling 6.5B+ place visits
- Ravel, a CRAN-published RStudio AI copilot for context-aware analysis, safe staged actions, model interpretation, and Quarto drafting
- Wayline, a production-style travel analytics product with route orchestration, predictive trip scoring, protected API usage, and exportable planning outputs
- Fraud modeling plus blockchain audit architecture for healthcare claims
- Simulation-led staffing optimization for fulfillment operations
- Readmission risk modeling with SQL, R, and BI integration
- 114K+ case survival analysis on SEER lung cancer data
:::
:::
